sub_problems: How can deployment-aging effects in LLM agents be empirically measured — do relaxation times to novel inputs grow with deployment age, and what is the time scaling?
Is the aging consistent with glassy dynamics (power-law, many metastable minima) or diffusive (exponential, single basin)?
What is the right fine-tune protocol for aged models given their metastable-landscape structure — does standard gradient navigation fail?
How are aging effects distinguished from concept drift, fine-tune-induced changes, or evaluation-noise drift?
